OmniUiCard.sampleDataSourceResponse: {"AvailablePrograms":true,"AssistanceHistory":false,"AllPrograms":{"Country":"US","IsRecommended":true,"CreatedDate":1750239286000,"Financial_Assistance_Program_Recommendation__ProgramName":"Diabetes Copay Assistance Program","ProcessException":[{"StepNumber":"4"}],"LoopBlockIterationIndex":1,"Financial_Assistance_Program_Recommendation__RecommendedProgramPriority":1,"ProgramName":"Diabetes Copay Assistance Program","ProgramId":"11WWs000000jJEbMAM","totalAppeals":0,"RuleType":"Eligibility","appealTimeout":false,"Financial_Assistance_Program_Recommendation__ProgramSummary":"This is to provide copay assistance for the patients who are suffering from diabetes","Status":"Rejected","ID":"AllPrograms","isAppealActive":false,"HasActiveCommercialIns":true,"Financial_Assistance_Program_Recommendation__IsInclusionRule":true,"appealLimit":5,"showReapply":true,"Financial_Assistance_Program_Eligibility__IsInclusionRule":true,"SubmissionDate":"06/18/2025","MinimumAge":44,"Financial_Assistance_Program_Eligibility__ProgramId":"11WWs000000jJEbMAM","GetShowReapplyStatusStatus":true,"ApplicationFormId":"13XWs000001kpBpMAI","LoopBlockIterationStatus":true},"Applications":false,"CareProgramEnrolleeName":"Bob Johnson"}
